title: cyphia angustiloba
intro: Cyphia angustiloba, also known as the Cape Cyphia or narrow-leaved Cyphia, is a plant species in the family Campanulaceae. It is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and stems are used to make herbal preparations, which are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal medicine, Cyphia angustiloba is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in tincture form to make it easier to take the medicinal properties of the plant.
